---
title: 'National Day of Prayer - Community Gathering  -  Thursday, May 1, 2014 from 11:30 A.M. to 1:30 P.M.'
date: '2014-03-22T15:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5494515930278826918'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/national-day-of-prayer-community.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Navigate'
  - 'Discover'
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<h4>
I got this in an email and wanted to share it with you. Event Details Below.&nbsp;</h4>
There really wasn't much info on the official website about it. So I figured it would be good to duplicate the information here.<br />
<h3>
Fort Worth, Tarrant County Community
 </h3>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
National Day of Prayer - Community Gathering
        Thursday, May 1, 2014 at 11:30 A.M. to 1:30 P.M.
        Burnett Plaza, 501 West 7th Street Fort Worth, TX 76102&nbsp;(7th, Lamar, Cherry and West 10th)
   </blockquote>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
2014 Theme: One Voice United<br />
2014 Scripture: Romans 15:6<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
&nbsp;â€œSo that with one mind and one voice you may glorify the God and Father Lord Jesus Christ.â€&nbsp;</blockquote>
&nbsp;Website:  <a href="http://nationaldayofprayer.org/events/" target="_blank">www.NationalDayofPrayer.org</a></blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;"></ul>
<br />
<div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;">
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<b>Go To YELP to show you'll be there, and add it to your calendar!&nbsp;</b><br />
<ul>
<li><b><a href="http://www.yelp.com/events/fort-worth-national-day-of-prayer-community-gathering-thursday-may-1-2014" target="_blank">http://www.yelp.com/events/fort-worth-national-day-of-prayer-community-gathering-thursday-may-1-2014</a></b></li>
</ul>
</blockquote>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
<h4>
<b>This Even Is For You IF</b></h4>
As a member of the Fort Worth Tarrant County Community, <b>who believe prayer is the answer</b> for our city and nation.<br />
<br />
Our community comes together each year on the <b>First Thursday in May</b> to join with friends, neighbors, co-workers, community leaders, and musicians to lift our voices in prayer and worship as a community in prayer.
 <br />
<br />
<h4>
We need your involvement.&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
In addition to Joining Us for the 2014 National Day of Prayer we invite you to take part in the planning and organizational meetings.<br />
<br />
Meetings are on Mondayâ€™s at noon in the Burnett Plaza Office Building, (address above). For those who cannot attend the noon meetings we schedule Saturday lunch meetings at various locations.<br />
<br />
We will also be having a call center, and work days in preparation for the event and ask you to prayerfully consider being a part.<br />
<br />
<h4>
If you are interested in joining these meetings, please send an email to:&nbsp;<a href="mailto:Vicki.Phillips1@att.net">Vicki.Phillips1@att.net</a>.&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
We are depending on people of faith to participate in the National Day of Prayer.<br />
<br />
<h4>
How can you participate?
 </h4>
<br />
<ul>
<li><b>Pray for the National Day of Prayer Event</b> and events across our nation on Thursday, May 1, 2014.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Join the National Day of Prayer Organizational Meetings</b></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Announce this event</b> in your&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>Businesses</li>
<li>Newsletters</li>
<li>Emails</li>
<li>Churches</li>
<li>Synagogues</li>
<li>Community Calendars</li>
<li>School Calendars</li>
<li>Adds in the newspapers</li>
<li>City Calendars</li>
<li>Magazines</li>
<li>Radio Stations</li>
<li>And Your Social Channels on Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Google+, Tumblr, and more.</li>
<li>Spread the word about this important day and enjoy our freedom to publicly assemble together in prayer.</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Join together as a community united on May 1st at Burnett Park, Downtown Fort Worth.</b></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Hold Your Own National Day of Prayer Event</b> at your work place, neighborhood, and nursing homes or pray in your home, and join by webcast at noon as the nation prays.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Consider making a donation to National Day of Prayer Tarrant County</b> to help cover the costs of this event. We would appreciate your support and donations of any amount. If you own a business and willing to donate services, we would greatly appreciate your participation.</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Bring canned or boxed food items to be donated to local food pantries within Tarrant County.</b></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Adopt-A-Leader</b>. Join Adopt-A-Leader by agreeing to encourage and pray for one of our local community leaders for a year. We desire to hold a future community gathering where the leaders and those who adopted them can share how this has made us a stronger individual, community, city and nation.</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
We look forward to hearing from you, and getting to know you as we come together as a community that PRAYS together.
 <br />
<br />
For More Information Contact:<br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
Vicki Phillips<br />
National Day of Prayer<br />
Fort Worth, Tarrant County<br />
Event Coordinator<br />
Direct Contact: 817-656-9906<br />
Cell Phone:        817-999-8764<br />
Email:  <a href="mailto:Vicki.Phillips1@att.net" target="_blank">Vicki.Phillips1@att.net</a></blockquote>
<br />
NOW IS THE TIME TO ADOPT A LEADER FOR A YEAR.  <a href="mailto:Vicki.Phillips1@att.net" target="_blank">ASK ME HOW</a>!<br />
<br />
<h4>
Google Map For Event: 
</h4>
<div style="height: 400px; overflow: hidden; width: 400px;">
<style media="screen" type="text/css">.gm-style img{max-width: none;}.gm-style-iw{height:auto !important; color:#000000; display:block; white-space:nowrap; width:auto !important; line-height:18px; overflow:hidden !important;}</style><script src="http://maps.google.com/maps/api/js?v=3&amp;sensor=false" type="text/javascript"></script><br />
<div style="height: 400px; overflow: hidden; width: 400px;">
<div id="gmap_canvas" style="height: 400px; width: 400px;">
</div>
<a class="map-data" href="http://www.embed-google-map.com/wordpress/">wordpress</a></div>
<script type="text/javascript">function init_map(){var myOptions = {zoom:16,center:new google.maps.LatLng(32.750451,-97.33370500000001),mapTypeId: google.maps.MapTypeId.ROADMAP};map = new google.maps.Map(document.getElementById("gmap_canvas"), myOptions);marker = new google.maps.Marker({map: map,position: new google.maps.LatLng(32.750451, -97.33370500000001)}); infowindow = new google.maps.InfoWindow({content:"<span style='height:auto !important; display:block; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden !important;'><strong style='font-weight:400;'>National Day of Prayer-Tarrant County Prayer in the Burnett Park</strong><br>501 W 7th St<br>76102 Fort Worth</span>" }); google.maps.event.addListener(marker, "click", function(){infowindow.open(map,marker);}); infowindow.open(map,marker);}google.maps.event.addDomListener (window, "load", init_map);</script></div>
<br />
<br />
<iframe 227px="" 310px="" frameborder="â€0â€³" height:="" height="â€310â€³" hidden="" id="â€banner2â€³" marginheight="â€0â€³" marginwidth="â€0â€³" name="â€countdownFrameâ€" overflow:="" src="â€http://nationalday.web803.discountasp.net/countdown/timer2.htmlâ€" width="â€227â€³"></iframe>

<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
Blog Connect:</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li>
<li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li>
<li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li>
<li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li>
</ul>
<h4>
Connect:</h4>
<div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-5eb48148a2fd.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-edc9e1cba163.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-3ffb893d0144.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-e84cbcff6e22.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4>
<i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br />
<i><br /></i><i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i><br />
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;">
<b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4>
